title: phleum dactylon
intro: Phleum dactylon, also known as buffalo grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phleum dactylon include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Phleum dactylon can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
